_comment: Improved Pterodactyl Egg for Icecast AutoDJ Radio Streaming
name: Icecast-AutoDJ-Radio-Enhanced
author: wegj1@hotmail.com
description: Enhanced Icecast radio streaming server with AutoDJ capabilities. Supports automated playlist streaming with customizable configurations for mount points, bitrates, and stream metadata.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash

set -e

RED='\033[0;31m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
CYAN='\033[0;36m'
NC='\033[0m'

log_info() { echo -e "${GREEN}[INFO]${NC} $1"; }
log_success() { echo -e "${CYAN}[SUCCESS]${NC} $1"; }
log_error() { echo -e "${RED}[ERROR]${NC} $1"; }

log_info "AutoDJ-Extreme Enhanced Installation v2.0"
log_info "Created by: @zeropointbruh"

cd /mnt/server || exit 1

log_info "Downloading AutoDJ-Extreme repository..."
REPO_URL="${REPO_URL:-https://github.com/ZEROPOINTBRUH/AutoDJ-Extreme.git}"

if ! git clone "$REPO_URL" repo 2>&1; then
    log_error "Failed to clone repository"
    exit 1
fi

log_info "Copying configuration files..."
cp repo/configs/icecast.xml /mnt/server/icecast.xml
cp repo/configs/ezstream.v1.xml /mnt/server/ezstream.xml
cp repo/configs/run-enhanced.sh /mnt/server/run.sh
chmod +x /mnt/server/run.sh

log_info "Setting up directories..."
mkdir -p /mnt/server/music
mkdir -p /mnt/server/log
touch /mnt/server/playlist.m3u

cat > /mnt/server/refresh_playlist.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash
EZSTREAM_PID=$(pgrep ezstream | head -1)
[ -n "$EZSTREAM_PID" ] && kill -SIGHUP $EZSTREAM_PID && echo "Playlist refreshed"
EOF

cat > /mnt/server/skip_track.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash
EZSTREAM_PID=$(pgrep ezstream | head -1)
[ -n "$EZSTREAM_PID" ] && kill -SIGUSR1 $EZSTREAM_PID && echo "Track skipped"
EOF

chmod +x /mnt/server/refresh_playlist.sh
chmod +x /mnt/server/skip_track.sh

rm -rf repo

log_success "Installation completed successfully!"
log_info "Next steps:"
log_info "  1. Upload music to /music directory"
log_info "  2. Start the server"
log_info "Created by @zeropointbruh | https://banabyte.com"

exit 0

variables.name: Repository URL
variables.description: Git repository URL for the Icecast AutoDJ source code. Leave default to use the official repository.

variables.name: Source Password
variables.description: Password for streaming sources to connect to Icecast. Change this to a secure password.

variables.name: Admin Password
variables.description: Password for the Icecast web admin interface. Change this to a secure password.

variables.name: Admin Username
variables.description: Username for the Icecast web admin interface.

variables.name: Relay Password
variables.description: Password for relay servers. Change this to a secure password.

variables.name: Mount Point
variables.description: The mount point where the stream will be accessible (e.g., /stream or /radio.mp3)

variables.name: Max Clients
variables.description: Maximum number of concurrent listeners allowed.

variables.name: Max Sources
variables.description: Maximum number of streaming sources allowed.

variables.name: Stream Format
variables.description: Audio format for the stream (MP3, OGG, OPUS, etc.)

variables.name: Encoder
variables.description: Encoder to use for streaming (e.g., LAME for MP3, Vorbis for OGG)

variables.name: Metadata Program
variables.description: Program to extract metadata from audio files

variables.name: Hostname
variables.description: Hostname or IP address for the radio server

variables.name: Location
variables.description: Geographic location of the server (for metadata)

variables.name: Admin Email
variables.description: Contact email for the server administrator
